---
title: "data: Baseline Characteristics (Table 1) and Drugs per Class (Table S2)"
author: "Till Julius Adam"
date: "2025-02-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(writexl)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(officer)


data <- read_excel("data_simulated.xlsx")
data$Any_DE <- as.factor(data$Any_DE)
data$Any_Overdiagnosis <- as.factor(data$Any_Overdiagnosis)
data$Any_Underdiagnosis <- as.factor(data$Any_Underdiagnosis)
data <- data[data$ExamType == 1, ]
data$Adopted[data$Adopted == -7] <- NA
data$FollowUp_yn <- as.factor(data$FollowUp_yn)
```

```{r}
# Check the variable
table(data$FollowUp_yn, useNA = "always")
class(data$FollowUp_yn)
str(data$FollowUp_yn)
```


Descriptive Characteristics Table
```{r}
generate_characteristics_table <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    select(
      Any_DE, Any_Overdiagnosis, Any_Underdiagnosis,
      Nr_Overdiagnosis, Nr_Underdiagnosis,

      # Categorical
      sex, race, AdoptedPatient, Siblings, Family_History_Any, EducationPatient, OccupPaitentHighest, Smoking, Any_Trauma, FollowUp_yn,

      Antipsychotic_discharge,
      Aripiprazole_discharge, Risperidone_discharge, Quetiapine_discharge, Ziprasidone_discharge, Paliperidone_discharge, Chlorpromazine_discharge,
      Olanzapine_discharge, Latuda_discharge,

      Antidepressant_discharge,
      Citalopram_discharge, Escitalopram_discharge, Fluoxetine_discharge, Venlafaxine_discharge, Cymbalta_discharge, Bupropion_discharge,
      Sertraline_discharge, Elavil_discharge, Paroxetine_discharge, Amitriptyline_discharge, Mirtazapine_discharge, Pristiq_discharge,
      Luvox_discharge, Nortriptyline_discharge, Trazodone_discharge,

      Mood_Stabilizer_discharge, Lithium_discharge, Lamotrigine_discharge, Depakote_discharge, `Divalproex Sodium Er_discharge`,

      Anxiolytic_Hypnotic_discharge, Lorazepam_discharge, Clonazepam_discharge, Diphenhydramine_discharge, Hydroxyzine_discharge, Buspar_discharge,
      Melatonin_discharge,

      Stimulant_discharge, Concerta_discharge,
      Adderall_discharge, Focalin_discharge, Vyvanse_discharge, Strattera_discharge, `Guanfacine HC_discharge`, Clonidine_discharge,

      # Continuous
      Age, BMI, SES_Average,
      mean_followup,
      YMRS_total_48h, YMRS_total_1m, MADRS_total, GAF_Current, BeckAnxietyInventoryPWsum, QoL,

      BPRS_total, SomaticConcern, Anxiety, EmotionalWithdrawal, ConceptualDisorg, GuiltFeelings, Tension, MannerismsPosturing, Grandiosity,
      DepressiveMood, Hostility, Suspiciousness, HallucinatoryBehav, MotorRetard, Uncooperativeness, UnusualThoughtContent, BluntedAffect,
      Excitement, Disorientation,

      SeverityOfIllness, SeverityPositiveSx, SeverityDepression, SeverityAnxiety, SeverityMoodSwings,

      SUMD_total, SUMD1, SUMD2, SUMD3,

      GBI_Depression_total, GBI_Hypomanic_total,

      ROAS_POW_total, ROAS_P6M_total,

      HVLTTScore, CPT_TScore, FLUSTscore, WMS3TScore, TMTATscore, NABTscore, WRAT3SS, BACSTScore
    ) %>%
    tbl_summary(
      #by= Any_DE,
      include = everything(),
      statistic = list(
        all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})",
        all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd}) [{min}, {max}]",
        mean_followup ~ "{mean} ({sd}) [{p25}, {p75}]"
      ),
      digits = list(
        all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1),
        all_continuous() ~ c(2,2,2,2)
      ),
        type = list(
              Nr_Overdiagnosis ~ "continuous",
              Nr_Underdiagnosis ~ "continuous",
              Age ~ "continuous",
              BMI ~ "continuous",
              SES_Average ~ "continuous",
              mean_followup  ~ "continuous",

              YMRS_total_48h ~ "continuous",
              YMRS_total_1m ~ "continuous",
              MADRS_total ~ "continuous",
              GAF_Current ~ "continuous",
              BeckAnxietyInventoryPWsum ~ "continuous",
              QoL ~ "continuous",

              BPRS_total ~ "continuous",
              SomaticConcern ~ "continuous",
              Anxiety ~ "continuous",
              EmotionalWithdrawal ~ "continuous",
              ConceptualDisorg ~ "continuous",
              GuiltFeelings ~ "continuous",
              Tension ~ "continuous",
              MannerismsPosturing ~ "continuous",
              Grandiosity ~ "continuous",
              DepressiveMood ~ "continuous",
              Hostility ~ "continuous",
              Suspiciousness ~ "continuous",
              HallucinatoryBehav ~ "continuous",
              MotorRetard ~ "continuous",
              Uncooperativeness ~ "continuous",
              UnusualThoughtContent ~ "continuous",
              BluntedAffect ~ "continuous",
              Excitement ~ "continuous",
              Disorientation ~ "continuous",

              SeverityOfIllness ~ "continuous",
              SeverityPositiveSx ~ "continuous",
              SeverityDepression ~ "continuous",
              SeverityAnxiety ~ "continuous",
              SeverityMoodSwings ~ "continuous",

              SUMD_total ~ "continuous",
              SUMD1 ~ "continuous",
              SUMD2 ~ "continuous",
              SUMD3 ~ "continuous",

              GBI_Depression_total ~ "continuous",
              GBI_Hypomanic_total ~ "continuous",

              ROAS_POW_total ~ "continuous",
              ROAS_P6M_total ~ "continuous",

              HVLTTScore ~ "continuous",
              CPT_TScore ~ "continuous",
              FLUSTscore ~ "continuous",
              WMS3TScore ~ "continuous",
              TMTATscore ~ "continuous",
              NABTscore ~ "continuous",
              WRAT3SS ~ "continuous",
              BACSTScore ~ "continuous"
          ),
      missing = "no"
    ) %>%
    #add_overall() %>%
    modify_header(label ~ "Characteristic") %>%
    modify_table_body(
      ~ .x %>% filter(!(
# --- Demographics / exposures ---
            (variable == "Any_DE" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Any_Overdiagnosis" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Any_Underdiagnosis" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "AdoptedPatient" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Siblings" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Family_History_Any" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Smoking" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Any_Trauma" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "FollowUp_yn" & label == "0") |

            # --- Antipsychotics ---
            (variable == "Antipsychotic_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Aripiprazole_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Risperidone_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Quetiapine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Ziprasidone_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Paliperidone_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Chlorpromazine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Olanzapine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Latuda_discharge" & label == "0") |

            # --- Antidepressants ---
            (variable == "Antidepressant_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Citalopram_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Escitalopram_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Fluoxetine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Venlafaxine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Cymbalta_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Bupropion_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Sertraline_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Elavil_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Paroxetine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Amitriptyline_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Mirtazapine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Pristiq_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Luvox_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Nortriptyline_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Trazodone_discharge" & label == "0") |

            # --- Mood stabilizers ---
            (variable == "Mood_Stabilizer_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Lithium_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Lamotrigine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Depakote_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Divalproex Sodium Er_discharge" & label == "0") |

            # --- Anxiolytics / hypnotics ---
            (variable == "Anxiolytic_Hypnotic_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Lorazepam_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Clonazepam_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Diphenhydramine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Hydroxyzine_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Buspar_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Melatonin_discharge" & label == "0") |

            # --- Stimulants ---
            (variable == "Stimulant_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Concerta_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Adderall_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Focalin_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Vyvanse_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Strattera_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Guanfacine HC_discharge" & label == "0") |
            (variable == "Clonidine_discharge" & label == "0")
      ))
    )
}

characteristics_table <- generate_characteristics_table(data)
characteristics_df <- as_tibble(characteristics_table)
characteristics_df
```


Write to word using flextable
```{r}
# Set default flextable properties for APA format
set_flextable_defaults(
  font.family = "Arial",
  font.size = 9,  # APA requires 12pt font
  padding.bottom = 3,
  padding.top = 3,
  padding.left = 2,
  padding.right = 2,
  text.align = "left",  # Left-align text for readability
  line_spacing = 2  # Double-spacing as per APA norms
)

# Adjust flextable for categorical variables with APA style
ft <- flextable(characteristics_df) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%  # Base style
  border_outer(border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 1)) %>%  # Keep only outer borders
  border_remove() %>%  # Remove all inner borders
  hline_top(border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 1), part = "header") %>%  # Top border for header
  hline(border = fp_border(color = "black", width = 1), part = "header") %>%  # Bottom border for header
  align(align = "left", j = 1, part = "all") %>%  # Left-align first column (stub)
  align(align = "center", part = "header") %>%  # Center column headings
  bold(part = "header") %>%  # Bold headers
  width(j = 1, width = 1.75) %>%  # Stub column slightly wider
  width(j = 2, width = 1) %>%
  set_caption("Table 1*") %>%  # APA-style numbering & italicized title
  add_footer_lines("Note. Include general, specific, and probability notes here.")  # APA-style note

# Page layout for Word document
margins <- page_mar(
  bottom = 1,
  top = 1,
  right = 1,
  left = 1
)
format_table_wide <- prop_section(
  page_margins = margins
)

# Save the flextable as a Word document
save_as_docx(ft,
             path = "Table 1_Baseline Characteristics.docx",
             pr_section = format_table_wide)
```


Table S2: Drugs per Class at Baseline (Discharge)
```{r}
N_total <- nrow(data)

# Define drugs by class (column name -> display name)
drug_classes <- list(
  Antipsychotics = c(
    Aripiprazole_discharge = "Aripiprazole",
    Quetiapine_discharge = "Quetiapine",
    Risperidone_discharge = "Risperidone",
    Chlorpromazine_discharge = "Chlorpromazine",
    Ziprasidone_discharge = "Ziprasidone",
    Paliperidone_discharge = "Paliperidone",
    Olanzapine_discharge = "Olanzapine",
    Latuda_discharge = "Latuda"
  ),
  Antidepressants = c(
    Fluoxetine_discharge = "Fluoxetine",
    Sertraline_discharge = "Sertraline",
    Escitalopram_discharge = "Escitalopram",
    Citalopram_discharge = "Citalopram",
    Bupropion_discharge = "Bupropion",
    Venlafaxine_discharge = "Venlafaxine",
    Paroxetine_discharge = "Paroxetine",
    Trazodone_discharge = "Trazodone",
    Mirtazapine_discharge = "Mirtazapine"
  ),
  `Mood Stabilizers` = c(
    Lithium_discharge = "Lithium",
    Lamotrigine_discharge = "Lamotrigine",
    Depakote_discharge = "Depakote/Divalproex"
  ),
  `Anxiolytics/Hypnotics` = c(
    Clonazepam_discharge = "Clonazepam",
    Lorazepam_discharge = "Lorazepam",
    Diphenhydramine_discharge = "Diphenhydramine",
    Hydroxyzine_discharge = "Hydroxyzine",
    Buspar_discharge = "Buspar"
  ),
  Stimulants = c(
    `Guanfacine HC_discharge` = "Guanfacine HC",
    Strattera_discharge = "Strattera (Atomoxetine)",
    Concerta_discharge = "Concerta",
    Adderall_discharge = "Adderall",
    Focalin_discharge = "Focalin",
    Vyvanse_discharge = "Vyvanse",
    Clonidine_discharge = "Clonidine"
  )
)

# Class-level columns
class_cols <- c(
  Antipsychotics = "Antipsychotic_discharge",
  Antidepressants = "Antidepressant_discharge",
  `Mood Stabilizers` = "Mood_Stabilizer_discharge",
  `Anxiolytics/Hypnotics` = "Anxiolytic_Hypnotic_discharge",
  Stimulants = "Stimulant_discharge"
)

# Build frequency table
rows <- list()
for (cls in names(drug_classes)) {
  # Class-level row
  class_col <- class_cols[[cls]]
  class_n <- sum(data[[class_col]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  class_pct <- round(100 * class_n / N_total, 1)
  rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    Class = cls, Drug = paste0(cls, " (any)"),
    N = class_n, Percent = class_pct, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  # Individual drug rows
  drugs <- drug_classes[[cls]]
  for (col_name in names(drugs)) {
    drug_n <- sum(data[[col_name]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    drug_pct <- round(100 * drug_n / N_total, 1)
    rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      Class = "", Drug = paste0("
  ", drugs[[col_name]]),
      N = drug_n, Percent = drug_pct, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}

table_s2 <- bind_rows(rows)
table_s2$`N (%)` <- paste0(table_s2$N, " (", table_s2$Percent, ")")
table_s2_out <- table_s2 %>% select(Class, Drug, `N (%)`)

table_s2_out
```
